author: @pairotelee
text:
Amazing Harbin, especially the ' Ice & Snow Festival ' is so unique in the world ...... my hearty CONGRATULATIONS!   from ' The City of Angel ', Bangkok.
As a China-born, Thai national of 76, I still couldn't visit all of China & hope to do so when I have a chance. I was born in Gingle, a county of Guilin, Guangxi, China when my medical father was assisting the Chinese Red Cross during WWII before going back to Hong Kong (HK) & later being recalled by his parents to the Kingdom of Thailand (formerly Siam). At 12, I was sent back to HK for 9 years & another 5 years in the US for my education. Afterward, I have been doing over 30 professional jobs & traveled the world in many businesses, especially in HK, China, Europe, & the US.
I love to swim in cold weather (of Guilin, Guangxi) & swam in the Lake District of the UK & cities of Germany in cold water & I am looking forward to swimming in Harbin's pool in the future ......
